basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Punjab. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree (M.Sc./M.Tech.) in Computer Science, Mathematics, or related discipline with valid NET/GATE (unless exempted), Undergraduate degree (B.Tech./B.E.) in Computer Science, CSE, IT, Mathematics, Mathematics & Computing or related with valid GATE (not mandatory for IIT/IIIT/NIT graduates), Three-year B.Sc. + two-year M.Sc. equivalent to B.Tech./B.E. with applicable GATE/NET rules, Strong understanding of Data Structures, Graph Algorithms and Analysis of Algorithms, Proficiency in Python or C++
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree (M.Sc./M.Tech.) in Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related discipline. For M.Sc. candidates, valid NET/GATE required unless exempted through M.Tech. Undergraduate degree (B.Tech./B.E.) in Computer Science, Computer Science & Engineering, Information Technology, Mathematics, Mathematics & Computing or related discipline with valid GATE qualification (not mandatory for IIT/IIIT/NIT graduates). Three-year B.Sc. followed by two-year M.Sc. equivalent to B.Tech./B.E. with GATE/NET rules applying. Strong understanding of Data Structures, Graph Algorithms and Analysis of Algorithms. Proficiency in Python or C++.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Ropar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Ropar is 15th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Postgraduate degree (M.Sc./M.Tech.) in Computer Science or Mathematics, or an Undergraduate degree (B.Tech./B.E.) in a related field with valid GATE/NET qualifications as specified.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will primarily involve an interview, which may be conducted in either online or offline mode.

faq.question: Q6. What are the key skills required for this role?
faq.answer: A strong understanding of Data Structures, Graph Algorithms, and Analysis of Algorithms is essential. Proficiency in programming languages like Python or C++ is also required.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Ropar is a contractual job, offering a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Ropar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar is located in Ropar, Punjab.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Punjab apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions applications are invited from eligible candidates in Punjab, but it's advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. Always refer to the official sources for the most accurate information.
